headline: Hospital Chains Stocks Q1 Earnings Review: Universal Health Services (NYSE:UHS) Shines
summary: The end of an earnings season can be a great time to discover new stocks and assess how companies are handling the current business environment. Let’s take a look at how Universal Health Services (NYSE:UHS) and the rest of the hospital chains stocks fared in Q1.

headline: Zacks Industry Outlook Highlights Tenet Healthcare, Universal Health Services, Acadia Healthcare and Community Health Systems
summary: Hospital stocks are adapting to shifting care trends, with Tenet Healthcare, Universal Health, Acadia Healthcare and Community Health Systems in focus.
